name: Concurrent FIFO queue with explicit head/tail nodes
task: Create /tmp/eval_cqueue/cq.py with class Queue. Methods: enqueue(x) appends, dequeue() removes and returns the front element or None if empty. The queue must be backed by a singly-linked list with separate head and tail node references — NOT a Python list, deque, or queue.Queue. Operations must be safe under concurrent threads (multiple producers and multiple consumers). Forbidden: do not import queue, do not use collections.deque, do not use threading.RLock. You may use threading.Lock and threading.Condition.
